MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-06-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Apperance:

Atty. Lis Bowman of Bryan Cave LLP, 415-675-1990, for Defendant and moving party JPMorgan Chase Bank.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS U.S. BANK, CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY AND JPMORGAN CHASE BANKS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. No opposition filed. Order for the same signed in open court.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Dept.501; Not Reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Tuesday, January 6, 2015:
Timothy Y. Fong, Esq. (510.842.5030) for Plaintiff HOMAYUN ZADEH;
Lisa M. Bowman, Esq. of Bryan Cave LLP (415.675.1990) for Defendant JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, National Association a New York Corporation;
No other appearances.

The Court, having reviewed the briefs submitted, and having heard oral argument, rules as follows: The matter is unopposed. The Court finds good cause to grant Timothy Y. Fong's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for Plaintiff Homayun Zadeh. Counsel to prepare and submit a form of order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (501)

Motion To Compel Pltff To Appear At Deposition And Produce Documents; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TIMOTHY Y. FONG, TEL. NO. (510)842-5030 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LISA M. BOWMAN OF BRYAN CAVE LLP, TEL. NO. 675-1990 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY AND JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A'S Motion To Compel Pltff To Appear At Deposition And Produce Documents; And For Sanctions - Motion to compel plaintiff to appear at deposition and produce documents is granted. Plaintiff to appear at his deposition with documents responsive to the deposition notice on a mutually agreed upon date no later than February 6, 2015. If the parties cannot agree on a mutually agreed upon date and time then the deposition shall be held at the law offices of Bryan Cave, 560 Mission Street, 25th Floor, San Francisco on February 6, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. and will proceed pursuant to the Code of Civil Procedure. Defendant's request for sanctions is granted against plaintiff and his attorney of record, Timothy Y. Fong. Sanctions in the amount of $3238.80 to be paid to Defendant and their attorneys of record no later than 9:30 a.m. February 6, 2015. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro-tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT
